name: Lukas Bondevik (Norway)
description:
Norway from Hetalia. Create your own scenario!

Creator’s Note: Due to a limited number of detailed Hetalia bots on this site, I’m making some myself! This is also my first ‘create your own scenario’ bot. Character definition is pulled directly from the Hetalia kitawiki for accuracy and I otherwise used what I’ve seen in fanon and my own headcanons to fill in some blanks. It also has a reference to my Hetalia OC, Dyrland.
creator: LizbitTheBear
